title: Observed money-moving tool plus credentials is a hard blocker

origin.description: Contract seed: a commerce server exposing tools that explicitly create payments and issue refunds, alongside an API credential. Replace with a redacted real-world snapshot before R2 final acceptance.

humanExpectation.rationale: A provided tool explicitly performs a money-moving action (create payment, issue refund) and the server holds a credential to do it for real. An autonomous agent invoking it could move money irreversibly, so it must be blocked.
knownLimitations: If a tool only reads payment data rather than moving money, it should be reclassified; the detector fires on money-moving verbs in the model-visible metadata.
